subject: Fwd: Receipt for your tesco.com order 7221-8154-691 today
text:
Hello Sam.

Thank you for shopping at Tesco.

What happens now?

Order placed
Order number 7221-8154-691

Order picked

Delivery scheduled — Today between 17:00 and 18:00

This email is a confirmation only and not yet a final receipt. You will receive a final receipt once your order has been delivered. The items, prices, weights and offers shown will be confirmed at delivery and may vary slightly.

If you have any questions please contact our Customer Service team.

Tesco Stores Ltd
